goal: subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s).contains(a) = subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, a)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: Subgroup[T1]) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](subgroup_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = Subgroup.new[T0](subgroup_preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[G, H](f, s)

function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](x0) != Subgroup.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[G](subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s), subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s), a)
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, a)

goal: subgroup_subset[H](s, t) = forall(x0: H) { s.contains(x0) implies t.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[H](s, t)
(forall(x0: H) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 ∈ t } = true)
function(x0: H) { not (x0 ∈ s and not x0 ∈ t) }(f.hom(a))
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[G](subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s), subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t))

goal: subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s.intersection(t)).contains(a) = subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s).intersection(subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t)).contains(a)

proof: let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s ∩ t) != w0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s) ∩ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t) }
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[G](full_subgroup[G], subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, full_subgroup[H]))
let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ full_subgroup[G] and not w0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, full_subgroup[H]) }
function(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ full_subgroup[G] or x0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, full_subgroup[H]) }(w0)
function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1]) { subgroup_preimage[T0, T1](x0, identity_subgroup[T1]) = group_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[G, H](f)
